title: Cloche Creations
description: Allows the growing of various essences and ores and other such materials in the garden cloche

Cloche Creations is an add-on mod that aims to add support to the Immersive Engineering Cloche for crops that maybe shouldn't have them or would otherwise not normally have support added.









![compat header](https://i.imgur.com/nGxTgmH.png)
Mystical Agriculture - Essences

Mystical Agradditions - Nether Stars, Dragon Head, Inferium Essence etc.

 

Plans to add more are in an "as suggested or needed" basis.

 
Requires:

- **_Mystical Agriculture_**
- **_Mystical Agradditions_**
- **_Immersive Engineering_**
 

 

Please Report any issues or bugs you find to the Discord!

 

 

You are free to use this in modpacks!

Wanna Help Support Me?
